books.title: The Subjection of Women
books.author: John Stuart Mill
books.summary: John Stuart Mill argues for the social and legal equality of men and women.

books.title: The Chinese Parrot
books.author: Earl Derr Biggers
books.summary: A Chinese detective of the Honolulu Police Department is recruited to safeguard the transfer of a valuable pearl necklace to a famous tycoon.

books.title: The Autobiography of Benjamin Franklin
books.author: Benjamin Franklin
books.summary: Benjamin Franklin writes about his youth, adventures, and achievements.

books.title: A General History of the Pirates
books.author: Captain Charles Johnson
books.summary: The lives and stories of the daring pirate outlaws who terrorized the Atlantic Ocean and Caribbean Sea in the 18th century.

books.title: The House of Arden
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: Two children, with the aid of a magical white mole, travel into the past in search of their family’s long-lost treasure.

books.title: Sunshine Sketches of a Little Town
books.author: Stephen Leacock
books.summary: A humorous account of life in the fictional small town of Mariposa.

books.title: Hedda Gabler
books.author: Henrik Ibsen
books.summary: Newly-married Hedda Gabler struggles to control her life and the lives of those around her.

books.title: A Princess of Mars
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: An adventurer finds himself battling alien civilizations on the strange surface of Mars.

books.title: The Brooklyn Murders
books.author: G. D. H. Cole
books.summary: Scotland Yard and a pair of amateur sleuths investigate the case of two heirs to a fortune who apparently murdered each other.

books.title: The Three Impostors
books.author: Arthur Machen
books.summary: Two flâneurs in Victorian London get caught up with the members of a secret society and their search for a rare Roman coin.

books.title: The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano
books.author: Olaudah Equiano
books.summary: An autobiography of an ex-slave in the mid 1700s.

books.title: The Starvel Hollow Tragedy
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: A fire that leaves three dead has enough hints of murder to draw our detective up to Yorkshire.

books.title: Practical Mysticism
books.author: Evelyn Underhill
books.summary: Evelyn Underhill makes the case that mysticism is accessible and beneficial to everyone.

books.title: Democracy and Education
books.author: John Dewey
books.summary: A critical survey of the philosophy and aims of education in a democratic society.

books.title: Victory Odes
books.author: Pindar
books.summary: A collection of lyric poems celebrating the triumphs of ancient Greek athletes in various sporting events.

books.title: Black No More
books.author: George Schuyler
books.summary: A medical process that makes black people look white revolutionizes American society.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Black Mask
books.author: E. W. Hornung
books.summary: The thieving duo of Raffles and Manders return in this second collection of A. J. Raffles short stories.

books.title: Verses on Various Occasions
books.author: John Henry Newman
books.summary: A collection of poems by John Henry Newman.

books.title: On a Chinese Screen
books.author: W. Somerset Maugham
books.summary: A collection of short vignettes about the people and places W. Somerset Maugham encountered during his travels along the Yangtze River in 1919–20.
